entry.title: Re: Release procedure configuration using standard workflow for multiple users
entry.content: Why you don't use Flexable workflow if you are on S/4 HANA, it is easier and less work to manage such scenarios.

entry.title: Re: Consume ODATA v4 API within the same S4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I had the same issue, so to fix it, I've done the followin, delete the communication arrangement first if you need to modify the custom communication scenario:

- In the custom communication scenario: put the full URL of the ODATA Service, example: /sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_real_estate_contract/srvd_a2x/sap/api_recontract/0001/

-Ping the Communication arrangement to check if the service is accessible

- In the ABAP Code:

Don't put the relative service root

" Create http client

lo_http_client = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( lo_destination ).

lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_factory_remote=>create_v4_remote_proxy(

EXPORTING

is_proxy_model_key = VALUE #( repository_id = 'DEFAULT'

proxy_model_id = 'Z_GETCONTRACT'

proxy_model_version = '0001' )

io_http_client = lo_http_client

iv_relative_service_root = '' ).

 

 

If after that you get a 403, it means that the user doesn't have authorization but it means also that you were able to reach the odata service outbound

 

Rachid

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

Hope You are fine.

My name is saad.from India,i am student of University and also done my training in sap s/4HANA.And now I complete my learning journey.

entry.title: How to Edit/Amend SAP distribution list - SO23
entry.content:
Process notes on how to Amend /Edit distribution list in SAP

 

Go to Tcode - SO23

 

 

Select from the Ty. (Shared or Private) and put the name of the Distribution list in Name field.

 

Once done, click on Find button and it will show the list which is in Shared and in Name space as below.

 

 

 

Double click on the Share Distribution – Name Space and it will open the list as below, go to Edit mode and update the email address / delete if not needed.

 

Put in the email address and press enter, it will automatically consider the Type (By E-Mail)

 

Hope the above scenario and example with screen shots were helpful. Happy Learning.

entry.title: Need help to get Build-Apps ressources
entry.content:
Fellow users, 

I've recently been assigned the task to create an application in SAP BTP Build Apps. I have to create a replica of the MIGO transaction in this tool, but I've never used it before. I've spent a lot of time trying to find intermediate/expert level courses or tutorials to help me understand how to create variables/logics/etc in order to create this application. 

I was able to understand most of the visual aspect of this tool as I worked on Adone Suite before. However the technical aspect of the Build Apps is a complex assignment for me. I'm looking for any ressources that could help me, videos, tutorials, templates, etc. 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Intercompany Execution of Services (aka "Dual Order")
entry.content:
@Henrik_Kiessler 

Hi Henrik,
just made some tests in the system. Could it be that currently this solution is supported only for transaction type SRVO but e.g. not for REPO?
So my tests took place in the In-House Repair context. There the tab "Intercompany Details" has NOT been displayed (for SRVO it did):


One of our customer mainly operates with In-House repair where also the integration with ARM is a good feature.
But it seems that Intercompany solution might not support this scenario.

Can you please tell me whether this is correct?

Thanks a lot!

BR
Harald

entry.title: Re: Material Master - Mass changes in S/4 Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, you can use MM17 in S/4 HANA, what do you mean by Data should be same?

You can also use LTMC but it requires more work where you need to create Projects and then subproject etc. LTMC have more options 🙂

Thanks,

Sanan

Great exercise, thanks for organizing it ^^

entry.title: Re: How to add a SAP managed tag?
entry.content:
Hi, @Christina_WS:

SAP Managed Tags are based on the company's overall corporate taxonomy. There is a strict process in place for including them on the community.

I'll reach out to you directly with links to the necessary forms/processes to add tags. 

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Material Coverage apps and Shortage logic
entry.content: Up! Does someone have an answer ? Else I will open a Case to SAP...

entry.title: Re: Extract peer SSL certificate automatically to resolve...
entry.content:
@Suneeth_P this would work, yes - just tested successfully.

But with this way, I would accept ALL certificates that have been signed from this CA...

Granted that it's very improbably that the CA get's compromised, but it would be more safe/explicit to add only the peers certificate to trust store.

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
entry.content: Object page:

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One upgrade path - upgraded!
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Fyi,

I can conclude that the sap b1 older version, such as sap b1 8.8 release family can be directly upgraded to sap b1 10.00 release family. I have did it.

But before succeeded, there were some problems that I can summarize as follows:

1. Database size > 550 gb and the upgrade duration was about 30 hours exclude the failure upgrades

2. The first upgrade trial failed due to disc space was not enough. I use 1 tb but not enough. So, I use 2 tb

3. The 2nd upgrade trial failed due to a sap note issue. Just only one sap note issue

4. The last trial upgrade was successful after I fixed the db before upgrade by using the sap note.

Good luck for all of you who want to upgrade directly from older version to latest version of sap b1. Don't be afraid. the upgrade strategy overview document from sap is just a theory or not yet updated, but practically, you can try direct upgrade to the latest version of sap b1 10.00 release family

entry.title: EAM planning bucket
entry.content:
Setup EAM I have followed BPE 4HI and create planning bucket for Technical object..

  • Duration 7 days
  • recurrence - weekly
  • recures every week
  • buckets in advance 5
  • assign technical object 1234

When orders are ready for schedle and run the Maintenance backlog overview and I select the Bucket for that Technincal obejct and look forward in advance 5 I see nothing. the order is set for this week.

I have no clue what is wrong. THis seems like strange way to manage what orders are ready to be schedule

 

Any insight into why nothig shows would be helpful. Or a better way to see if parts are on order with PO and it cant be scheduled it. I guess I expected a better view.

entry.title: SAP Business One Upgrade Challenges from SAP B1 8.81 to SAP B1 10.00 release family
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I want to share my experience to upgrade the SAP B1 version from 8.81 to 10.00. In this blog, I want to give you an insight about the Challenges in the version upgrade from the database size point of view.

So, what Challenges we do have to face when upgrading the SAP B1 on MSSQL version
from SAP B1 8.0 release family to SAP B1 10.00 release family with condition as follows:
1. Database size >= 100 GB
2. Database size < 100 GB


They are as follows:
A. Duration to upgrade (from start time to end time).
For this one, these followings should be considered as follows:
1. Hardware specifications for SAP B1 live server
- we must find out the ideal hardware specifications because it will affect the duration of the upgrade. Of course, all users must stop to use SAP B1 during upgrade
- we must also see the HDD type and size of the disk space that is used to store the sap b1 production live database and backup file of production database of previous version. If not, the upgrade process will be
terminated and error if the disk space is not enough anymore. The impact is we must restart from the beginning

2. Software Specifications for SAP B1 live server
- we must use at least minimum version of software specifications and support sap b1 latest version in order to run the setup wizard
- Software specifications must still be under maintenance period

3. The upgrading stepwises in the Setup in Process of sap b1 setup wizard
- The detail stepwise seems unavailable because no information from SAP Global Support. For me, it is the main challenges for SAP B1 consultants if the end users ask how long to take place
and what kind of upgrades the wizard do.
So far I notice 3 main steps  as follows:
* Pre upgrade testing. This won't take so much time. About 5-10% from total
* Upgrading in the setup in process. This step really takes so much time. About 90% from total
* Finalization (summary of the upgrade result). About 1% from total

In the upgrade steps, sub steps are:
- Upgrade database tables, for example OIVL, OILM (this table upgrading takes so much time), TAX1, etc
- Upgrade non database tables, for example Upgrading Production Orders,Upgrading Sales Orders, etc

What are the message for SAP about this challenge? SAP must realize that they should provide better ways to upgrade the SAP Version so that the production server down time can be minimized.
The prospect customers or lead will concern about it.

Herewith this post,I have attached a screen shot to show the SAP B1 database version history by querying it in the SQL query and the login screen of SAP B1 to show that the upgrade is successful.

The db size after upgrade is increased to about 60% from original size. You can see this following picture:

So, I want you all know that it is possible to upgrade from SAP B1 8.81 to SAP B1 10.00 without upgrade to SAP B1 9.0 release family first but for the company database size is > 100 Gb, you must consider your hardware specification. 

Thank you and good luck

Sincerely,

Jimmy Michel

(member of SAP SDN (old) and SAP SCN Community now since 2007)

entry.title: Re: How To Plan in SAP TM using TransportationOrderGenericRequest_In
entry.content:
Hi,

We are in S4 2023 version and we would pass the Freight Unit Number as reference (instead of OBD reference above) to assign to FO automatically. Replacing the above OBD number tag with FU number (618 Type code) doesn't work and gives the below error.

'No freight unit assigned for reference doc 100(/SCMTMS/TOR_ERR_HNDL.

Should we pass the FU number in a separate structure or same as above?

Regards,

Suresh

Am i missing anything?

entry.title: How to migrate to the Commerce Cloud CCv2 (part 2 - media)
entry.content:
Many steps are already given in the CXWorks article Migrate to SAP Commerce Cloud: Migrate Media with azcopy

Getting a SAS Token

Use the public IP that is for the outgoing Proxy. This will ensure that your IP is always the same, since this the provided IP is in whitelist added for the SAS Token. Other option: check your public IP adress that the server is using by accessing e.g. whatismyip.com or similar service.

However you need to setup the proxy before you use azcopy in the bash (and do not forget to replace username, password, proxyhost and port) .

 

export http_proxy='http://username:password@proxyhost:port/'
export https_proxy='https://username:password@proxyhost:port/'

 

As of Nov 2023 is the request of a SAS token done differently than before. The old way is mentioned in the azcopy article.
You need to create a Service request (and not any more a Support ticket)  in SAP for Me - Services and Support. Create a new request and select the option "CRM und Customer Experience" , then select / open Category "CX Commerce Cloud" and select "CX Commerce- Migration Projects" . Select the tile "CX Commerce - Creation of Media SAS token". it is required : environment (e.g. search for *-d1) and add the public IP address you got earlier. if the IP address is wrong, the SAS token is useless.

Not required anymore, but maybe helpful....
The storage id of the hot folder is NOT the same for the media storage and the SAS token will not work.
It might result in a authorization issue. The Media Storage Account Name can be found in the HAC of the cloud system in the Property:  media.globalSettings.cloudAzureBlobStorageStrategy.connection

The value is something like:
DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=xx123xx456xxxx78;AccountKey=XXXXXXXX;EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net

The SAS token is given in the ticket like this containing start and end date (see key st and se) of that token validity. Usually it is valid for 14 days.. You will receive an email with the following details:

======SAS Token List ======
st=2022-11-02T00%3A01Z&se=2022-12-30T00%3A01Z&sp=xxxxxx&sip=1.2.3.4&spr=https&sv=2022-03-28&ss=bqtf&srt=sco&sig=<secretKey>
Storage Name: xx123xx456xxxx78
SecretKey:<One Time Secret>

Please checkout the SecretKey and store it at a save place, since you can view it only one time.
Combine then the path (line one starting with "st=") and exchange the value of the last attribute sig with the secretKey you received.
This together with the host "https://[account-name].blob.core.windows.net/[container]" is needed for the next steps.

Download the azcopy executable from Microsoft to the system where you have the media stored. You do NOT need to have an AD account for this, since you are using a token.
Also : Testing this on a different system will not work, since the outgoing IP address is most likely different.

In case azcopy is not working as expected, you can check the connection and the logs.

Run this PowerShell command to test basic internet connectivity from the host. (Note: you can use any public URL in this test)

 

[System.Net.WebRequest]::Create("http://azcopyvnextrelease.blob.core.windows.net/releasemetadata/latest_version.txt").GetResponse().StatusCode

 

If you run that in PowerShell on the host, one of the following things should happen:

  1. It prints OK. This is the expected result if you run it on your desktop machine.
  2. It fails with an error, that includes the text “(407) Proxy Authentication Required”. Note that this text will be buried inside a larger error message. If this happens, it shows that the traffic is being directed through a proxy that requires authentication. Either the proxy is not used or the current version of AzCopy doesn't work with those proxies.
  3. It fails with some other error. That probably suggests that the host cannot reach the internet. In this case, this is not an AzCopy issue but is a network (configuration) issue.

Using the SAS token

I created an variable (e.g. sas to shorten the links a little, after i checked, if the connection works.

 

export sas="st=2024-05-15T00%3A01Z&se=2024-05-19T00%3A01Z&sp=rwdlacup&sip=193.41.37.3&spr=https&sv=2024-05-19&ss=bqtf&srt=sco&sig=TZADFFz9%2ByIJlLANPi6dQZTuYYiY9gG2qcnfLiY%3D"

 

You can use then ${sas} as shown below.
I first sync the sys-master-root and exclude the subfolders (default and also custom ones like "pdfs" or "survey"). Using sync makes it easier when you migrate data with a dry-run.  

Then I move through every folder, however first you need to create the subfolder using 

azcopy make

 

 

./azcopy sync "sys_master" "https://blablabla.blob.core.windows.net/sys-master-root/?${sas}" --recursive=true --delete-destination prompt --exclude-path "backofficeexcelimport;hmc;survey;backofficeconfiguration;pdfs;jasperreports;email-body;impex;catalogsync;images;cronjob"
./azcopy sync "sys_master/images" "https://blablabla.blob.core.windows.net/sys-master-images/images?${sas}" --recursive=true --delete-destination prompt --log-level ERROR
./azcopy sync "sys_master/impex" "https://blablabla.blob.core.windows.net/sys-master-impex/impex?${sas}" --recursive=true --log-level ERROR --delete-destination prompt
./azcopy sync "sys_master/cronjob" "https://blablabla.blob.core.windows.net/sys-master-cronjob/cronjob?${sas}" --recursive=true --log-level ERROR --delete-destination prompt
./azcopy sync "sys_master/catalogsync" "https://blablabla.blob.core.windows.net/sys-master-catalogsync/catalogsync?${sas}" --recursive=true --log-level ERROR --delete-destination prompt
./azcopy sync "sys_master/jasperreports" "https://blablabla.blob.core.windows.net/sys-master-jasperreports/jasperreports?${sas}" --recursive=true --log-level ERROR --delete-destination prompt
./azcopy sync "sys_master/survey" "https://blablabla.blob.core.windows.net/sys-master-survey/survey?${sas}" --recursive=true --log-level ERROR --delete-destination prompt
./azcopy sync "sys_master/pdfs" "https://blablabla.blob.core.windows.net/sys-master-pdfs/pdfs?${sas}" --recursive=true --log-level=ERROR --delete-destination prompt

entry.title: Its Possible set handler with Dinamic object
entry.content:
how to define set handle, with a dinamic object "Type REF Object"?

CLASS cl_report DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS: constructor,
             select,
             display,
             coluna_clicada.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_data,
            valor TYPE i,
            link_click TYPE char30,
          END OF ty_data.
    DATA: lt_data TYPE TABLE OF ty_data.
    DATA: o_control TYPE REF TO object.
    "FIELD-SYMBOLS: <fs_control> TYPE REF TO object.
ENDCLASS.                    "cl_report DEFINITION

CLASS cl_control DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS: constructor,
      init,
      handler FOR EVENT link_click OF cl_salv_events_table,
      teste_act.
    DATA: lv_is_ref TYPE c LENGTH 1.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA: o_report TYPE REF TO cl_report.

ENDCLASS.                    "cl_control DEFINITION

CLASS cl_report IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD constructor.
    DATA: lv_ref_control TYPE string,
          lv_typ_control TYPE string.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_object_control> TYPE REF TO cl_control.
    DATA: o_object TYPE REF TO data.

    CONCATENATE '(' sy-repid ')O_CNTR' INTO lv_ref_control.
    ASSIGN (lv_ref_control) TO <fs_object_control>.

*    CONCATENATE `\PROGRAM=` sy-repid `\CLASS=` 'CL_CONTROL' INTO lv_typ_control.
*    GET REFERENCE OF (lv_ref_control) INTO o_control.
    o_control = <fs_object_control>.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "constructor

  METHOD select.
*    SELECT *
*      FROM mara
*      INTO TABLE me->lt_mara.
*    me->lt_mara
    DATA: ls_mara TYPE ty_data.

    ls_mara-valor = 1.
    ls_mara-link_click = 'Clique aqui'.
    APPEND ls_mara TO lt_data.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "select


  METHOD display.
    DATA: lo_alv TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.
    TRY.
        cl_salv_table=>factory(
          IMPORTING
            r_salv_table = lo_alv
          CHANGING
            t_table      = me->lt_data ).

      CATCH cx_salv_msg.
    ENDTRY.

    IF lo_alv IS BOUND.
*     DEFININ EVENTS
      DATA: o_events TYPE REF TO cl_salv_events_table.

      DATA: o_columns TYPE REF TO cl_salv_columns,
            o_column  TYPE REF TO cl_salv_column_table.
      DATA: lv_ref_control TYPE string.
      FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_object_control> TYPE REF TO cl_control.

      o_events = lo_alv->get_event( ).

      o_columns = lo_alv->get_columns( ).
      o_column ?= o_columns->get_column( 'LINK_CLICK' ).
      o_column->set_cell_type( if_salv_c_cell_type=>hotspot ).

      CONCATENATE '(' sy-repid ')O_CNTR' INTO lv_ref_control.
      ASSIGN (lv_ref_control) TO <fs_object_control>.
*      ASSIGN ('me->O_CONTROL') to <fs_object_control>..
*      IF <fs_object_control> is ASSIGNED.
*      SET HANDLER <fs_object_control>->handler FOR o_events.
*      SET HANDLER O_CONTROL->HANDLER FOR o_events.
*        SET HANDLER: o_object->('HANDLER') FOR o_events.
        SET HANDLER <fs_object_control>->HANDLER for o_events.
*        CALL METHOD o_object->('HANDLER') for o_events.
*        SET HANDLER O_CONTROL->('handler') FOR ALL INSTANCES.
*        call method O_CONTROL->('TESTE_ACT').
*      ENDIF.

*      FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_object_control> TYPE REF TO object.


      lo_alv->display( ).
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "display

  METHOD coluna_clicada.
    BREAK-POINT.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "coluna_clicada

ENDCLASS.                    "cl_report IMPLEMENTATION

CLASS cl_control IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD constructor.
    CREATE OBJECT o_report.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "constructor

  METHOD init.
    o_report->select( ).
    o_report->display( ).
  ENDMETHOD.                    "init

  METHOD handler.
    BREAK-POINT.
    o_report->coluna_clicada( ).
  ENDMETHOD.                    "handler

  METHOD teste_act.
    BREAK-POINT.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "teste_act

ENDCLASS.                    "cl_control IMPLEMENTATION

INITIALIZATION.
  DATA: o_cntr TYPE REF TO cl_control.
  CREATE OBJECT o_cntr.
  o_cntr->lv_is_ref = 'X'.
  o_cntr->init( ).

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud IAG - Issues and Resolutions
entry.content:
hi debashish-sarma - 

We are facing issue in attaching the file to the ATTACHMENT section in the access request. When we raise access request and try to attach file we get error message "Document failed to upload" and then after few seconds the request gets submitted automatically, and we can see the attached file in the request.

The issue is when we access the same request and try to open the attachement we are getting message "Document is not available for download" and we are unable to open the attachement.

Did you encounter this or aware of the resolution.

Regards,

Yash

entry.title: Flexible workflow for Purchasing Requisition SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL
entry.content:
Hello Team,
I am using Flexible workflow for Purchasing Requisition and for that I am using SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL. 

In Method IF_SWF_FLEX_IFS_CONDITION_EVAL~EVALUATE_CONDITION, we are not getting PR number in parameter @IS_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_1 during PR creation. Instead of that we are getting GUID number.

Please help me how can we solve this..

 

Thanks.

SAP Business Workflow SAP Workflow Management, business rules capability ABAP Extensibility

To mask data, you/customer need to procure licence for "SAP UI Data Protection Masking" solution and then you can configure the BP address fields for masking using UIDP Product.

Regards,
Arun

entry.title: RefCount Error When Adding UserField Using SAP Business One SDK
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm facing an issue with the SAP Business One SDK while trying to add a UserField to a table. The error seems related to the reference count of COM objects. Here’s the context:

I have a method that retrieves field information from a source table using a UserFieldsMD object and then attempts to create a similar field in a destination table. I'm using Recordset and UserFieldsMD objects to handle this process.

Here’s a high-level outline of my process:

  1. I initialize a UserFieldsMD object and a Recordset to retrieve the field data from the source table.
  2. I extract the necessary field data and store it in a .NET dictionary.
  3. I release the UserFieldsMD and Recordset COM objects to manage resources effectively.
  4. I initialize a new UserFieldsMD object for the destination table and set its properties based on the extracted data.

When I attempt to add this UserField to the destination table, I encounter a refcount error.

I suspect that this issue is related to how COM objects are managed and released within the context of my method, especially since there appears to be a limitation on the number of active COM objects.

Could someone please provide guidance on best practices for managing COM object reference counts when adding UserField objects in SAP Business One SDK? Are there specific patterns or techniques recommended to avoid such errors?

Here is the full code I am using. The error occurs at the CreateField method (line 255):
https://gist.github.com/jonathascosta/6ea59e966c46eb43a74992151f60ab85

Any insights or suggestions on how to properly handle the lifecycle of these COM objects to avoid refcount errors would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your assistance!

Kind regards,

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!

entry.title: Re: EBS search string to dynamically get statement text
entry.content: Hi Pankaj, I have a requirement where in when ever the 86 Tag in the MT940 bank statement have :86:PPH (Business Tarnsaction code NTRF) -> I need to map it to another posting rule creatred for Interest Paid (NINT). But here the problem is Source field length is less than the target field length i.e. Mapping of PPH -> NINT is not possible because of length, Can you help me how to setup the search string for this case

entry.title: Exciting News: Updated Certification released for SAP Sales Cloud 2405 version
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

The Product Learning team at CX is thrilled to announce the release of the updated certification: SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP Sales Cloud

This certification specifically targets the SAP Sales Cloud NGAP version 2405, also known as C4C or SAP Cloud for Customer. Please note that this is not intended for the SAP Sales Cloud Version 2.

What's New in This Update?

Our latest update includes refreshed questions on a variety of topics related to SAP Sales Cloud version 2405, along with areas covering Clean Core. For the exam preparation, check out the following learning journeys and you also have the option to sign up for a classroom course or a live session. Look for the details at the end of these learning journeys.

  • Discovering SAP Sales Cloud 
  • Configuring SAP Sales and Service Cloud as an Administrator 
  • For more information on Clean Core, please visit Managing Clean Core for SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Important Note: To access this certification, an SAP Learning Hub License is required.

Topics and Weightage Breakdown:

  • User Management and Notification Process: 11% - 20%
  • Sales Contracts, Quotation, and Sales Order Management: 11% - 20%
  • Data Migration and Integration: 11% - 20%
  • Territory Management: ≤ 10%
  • Master Data (Account, Contact, Product, and Pricing): ≤ 10%
  • Implementation Basics and Fine Tuning: ≤ 10%
  • Reporting: ≤ 10%
  • Personalization and Extensibility: ≤ 10%
  • Sales Planning and Forecasting: ≤ 10%
  • Visit Planning and Execution: ≤ 10%
  • Lead and Opportunity Management: ≤ 10%
  • Managing Clean Core: ≤ 10%

For those interested, the certification is also accessible via the SAP Training Shop: Access the Certification Here

Best regards, The Product Learning Team at CX

SAP Sales Cloud Certification

entry.title: Re: New type of CDS entity available: CDS projection views
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

Maye I ask if it is possible to expose a CDS projection view as an API?

My problem is that the Quality Notification API in SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition https://api.sap.com/api/CE_QUALITYNOTIFICATION_0001/overview / https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0629fd486efa4d339f8b10603b6f1e3f/454808498fc344a8a08b912503d90ac0.html?locale=en-US does not allow extensibility.

Thus, custom fields added to the Quality Notification (business context: Quality Management: Quality Info Record in Procurement (QM_QUALITYINPROCUREMENT) can not be read by the Quality Notification API (and no config is there in the "custom fields" app to enable the custom field for the Quality notification API):

On the other hand, CDS view "I_QUALITYINPROCUREMENTTP_2" allows to show the custom field as shown below: 

So I was thinking of creating a service definition and then an OData service binding for it, to be able to query the CDS view from a 3rd party system and from postman.

The service definition is being created correctly: 

But no service binding can be generated: 

Would this be possible? Someone can help suggest how to expose the custom fields of quality notification level with an API so that a 3rd party system can read the data?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2024.001 Versão 1.10: Atualizações recentes na Nota Fiscal Eletrônica (NF-e)
entry.content:
Show! aqui também deu certo!

Obrigado @Eduardolarrion

entry.title: How to expose custom fields of Quality Notifications in SAP S4HANA Cloud public edition?
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

Maye I ask if it is possible to expose a CDS projection view as an API?

My problem is that the Quality Notification API in SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition https://api.sap.com/api/CE_QUALITYNOTIFICATION_0001/overview / https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0629fd486efa4d339f8b10603b6f1e3f/454808498fc344a8a08b912503d90ac0.html?locale=en-US does not allow extensibility.

Thus, custom fields added to the Quality Notification (business context: Quality Management: Quality Info Record in Procurement (QM_QUALITYINPROCUREMENT) can not be read by the Quality Notification API (and no config is there in the "custom fields" app to enable the custom field for the Quality notification API):

On the other hand, CDS view "I_QUALITYINPROCUREMENTTP_2" allows to show the custom field as shown below: 

So I was thinking of creating a service definition and then an OData service binding for it, to be able to query the CDS view from a 3rd party system and from postman.

The service definition is being created correctly: 

But no service binding can be generated: 

Would this be possible? Someone can help suggest how to expose the custom fields of quality notification level with an API so that a 3rd party system can read the data?

By the way, EML coding allows to read the custom fields, but my problem is that we need to read the quality notification custom fields with an API (???) from CPI in a new iFlow that needs to be developed: 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Why doesn't SLP recognize suppliers with special char...
entry.content:
Hi Ander - No, we did not find any solutions yet. Our customer has created a customer influence which you can vote for it. 

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/315162

entry.title: UDF Setup history item list BP ordered

If we make a sales order in SAP B1, I would like to see, by pressing SHIFT+F2 to see what the BP bought in the last 180 days and the quantities.

What query should I make, to see the list?

Please advise.

Thanks in advance

Regards Mark

entry.title: Chart of Account renumbering after transactions in the system?
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We have done some postings in the system and the customer would like to change the accounts from 8 digits to 6 digits. 

 

What will happen if we do a renumbering of G/L accounts on the operating G/L accounts? Will we face any issues or we will current transactions change account from 8 digit to 6 digit with their current value on the transactions in the system?

 

All the best,

Adam

 

Manage Operating G/L Accounts

 

 

YCOA - Edit chart of account list.

entry.title: API for Customer invoice Payment(Outbound Process)
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can anyone help me with the API for Customer invoice payment (Outbound Process) in the SAP S4 Hana Public Cloud ?

Requirement : As we are trying to send SAP posted customer payment document information to the 3rd party system by using outbound interface, But couldn't be able to find the exact API for the same.

Thanks,

Mandeep

entry.title: [Imposto retido na fonte na categoria Pagamento] Como conciliar lançamentos nesse caso?
entry.content:
Atualmente usamos o regime de caixa como método contábil e por esse motivo, na configuração do imposto retido da fonte selecionamos a categoria pagamento. 

Porém na tentativa de reconciliações, seja pra fins de pagamento ou "limpeza" de parceiro de negócios ou conta contábil, ele da um erro o que não me permite limpar a conta (Usar o mesmo código de imposto retido na fonte da categoria de pagamento para todas as transações durante a reconciliação [Mensagem 3821-32]). Isso tem acumulado muita coisa nas contas, o que dificulta a análise contábil. Abaixo segue o caso:

Estou a um tempo buscando uma solução pra isso, mas infelizmente até agora não encontrei nada. As pessoas só dão como solução trocar a categoria do imposto retido na fonte para a Nota Fiscal.

entry.title: Please help me with a survey for my research
entry.content:
Hello friends!

I'm working on my dissertation at Portsmouth University and surveying SAP implementation methodologies. If you have experience with SAP implementation or know someone who can help, I would greatly appreciate your participation!

I believe in the theory of seven handshakes - if not you, then perhaps your friends can support my research. Please tag anyone who might be interested in the comments!

Survey link: https://lnkd.in/dTvWSWTR

Thank you so much in advance for your help and support! 🙏

entry.title: Re: Passo a Passo da configuração e lançamentos dos Impostos Retidos na Fonte para serviços no SAP
entry.content:
Olá, boa tarde! Tudo bem?

Você teria dicas para quem usa a categoria Pagamento na configuração do imposto retido na fonte?

entry.title: Floor level Picking
entry.content:
What could be donewithout creating new storage type (if possible) to have EWM picking pick from the floor level bins.

Would storage sectioning be the best way to achieve is by create storage section FLOOR and then assigning floor level bins to the storage section. Then in material master have stock removal rule set to storage section FLOOR

Is the way I have it oulined the best way to achieve this?

Putaway would stay the same for inboud task. mixed storage (add to existing or empty)

entry.title: Re: Planned Order Process-( PP -EWM Integration)
entry.content:
Hello,

Find attached details regarding process flow with release order parts , in both the cases manufacturing order should be released for EWM to create documents

looks like planned orders do not create documents  in EWM , they should be converted in to production orders and then released for the system to create documents in EWM

1)

Process Flow for Release Order Parts Using Two EWM-Managed Storage Locations (Posting Change) (R1)

 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/e1c091c8bfaf4b6db4fef3271c8f6c5f.html

 

2)

Process Flow for Release Order Parts Using Inventory-Managed (MM-IM) Storage Location (R3)

 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/a776369850fa4a888daba4fea6425e98.html

entry.title: Re: SAP JCo initializer error
entry.content: Yes, the problem was indeed that I was using x86 instead of x64, such a silly mistake from me. Thank you so much!

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: Task 3:

entry.title: Re: SAP JCo initializer error
entry.content:
Glad to hear that you could get it working.
Possible errors for native library loading issues are also described in the JavaDoc at <JCoSDKDir>/javadoc/configuration.html

Anyhow, I strongly recommend to get the latest JCo patch level 3.1.10 nevertheless.
It's free of charge for SAP customers and partners.

entry.title: Re: Reconciliação interna com IRF no Pagamento
entry.content: Estou enfrentando um problema similar. No meu caso, uma nota fiscal com imposto foi lançada sem a devida tributação, resultando em um pagamento excessivo ao fornecedor. Ao perceber isso, fiz a provisão do imposto via LCM para compensar o valor pago a maior em outro título a pagar, que foi lançado corretamente com a tributação. No entanto, não estou conseguindo reconciliar a nota a pagar com essa provisão do imposto a ser compensada.

entry.title: Re: Reconciliação interna com IRF no Pagamento
entry.content: Saberia me dizer como prosseguir?

entry.title: SAP PI/PO migration from any-DB (MS SQL server) to HANA DB
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are planning to migrate from ECC (EHP8) application to S/4 HANA. And we have SAP PI/PO system integrated with ECC. So we are in doubt whether to migrate our SAP PI/PO application from MS SQL Server database to HANA database. As far as I know, unlike ECC or BW, we don't have huge demand for transactions or reports which are usually time-consuming or data-intensive in PI/PO. All PI objects are always in the runtime cache. In production environments, we archive messages frequently. So if we migrate PI/PO database from any DB (SQL db) to HANA DB I don't think it will make much difference. So can anyone please suggest our ideas.

Thanks,

Praveen

entry.title: Re: Simple understanding of Material Ledger in SAP S/4HANA for beginners
entry.content: Question- what key dependencies does the Material Ledger have with items like Controlling Area, Company code , profit center group, plant codes etc. For ML to work effectively as designed do the transactions need to be in the same controlling area or can they go across two controlling areas ? Also for transfer pricing to work effectively, does the receiver and sender for a transaction need to be in the same CCN or does having them in different CCN's enhance the transparency of the transaction . How does movements between profit center groups happen within one CCN ?

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
entry.content: Preview of the Object Page:

entry.title: Re: RRI jump option for the CDS Analytics Queries
entry.content:
RRI is feature of Bex query so the source does not matter. It should work on CDS based queries also.

In the BW/Bex Query Properties, ensure that the setting “Allow External Access” (or a similarly named setting depending on the version of SAP BW you are using) is enabled. This ensures that the query is visible and available as a jump target for other reports.

entry.title: We want to try loading a Rise course package to the iContent server and providing a link
entry.content: We are working with a content stakeholder that wants to utilize exams with a completion trigger tied to Rise course.  The exam would be built in SuccessFactors, and upon pass would grant credit for the Rise course.  Failure would result in pushing the learner to the course, which they then have to complete.  Has anyone tried loading the Rise package to the iContent server and providing a link the course designer could embed?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

My name is Bhuvana. I recently completed my master’s and looking for work, having moved from India to pursue my career in the tech sector. As a woman and minority in a new country, I am interested to utilize this opportunity to advance my career and make an impact in the technology industry.

This opportunity would significantly ease the financial burden of furthering my education, allowing me to focus fully on acquiring the skills needed to succeed. I have previous work experience in SAP and listing a certification would be extremely valuable in my job search. This credential would help me strengthen my profile.

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
Where is the Raylightsamples.lcmbiar file in SAP BO 4.3
entry.content:
In the SAP BusinessObjects RESTFUL WebService Users Guide for Webintelligence under section 5.2 it states:

You must deploy the LCMBIAR file included in the ZIP file in your CMS repository to be able to run the samples. The archive file is lcmbiar/RaylightSamples.lcmbiar.

Where would would I find the zip file that contains the RaylighSamples lcmbiar file?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Making employees recently increased in EC ineligible in compensation worksheets
entry.content:
Hi @Svetlana92 @ErikaT 

I documented the workaround I found in a new recording (link updated in the article above).

Please note that I forgot one step in the recording: when creating Integration Center job number 2 we need to add a filter to only send records with a value greater than 0 in the field Change Pct. This way we make sure to keep only the top of stack records WITH a salary change and exclude the ones that did not get a salary change.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
Hello,

on the previous home page there was the possibility to configure the dropdown list of the sort order in the search result of the legacy search.

see entry in system configuration/library:
# This configuration is used to change the order of sort options on the catalogue search screen.
# By Default it will be Relevance, Price, Tier, Rating, Title. First option on the list will be default sorting order on the catalog search screen. You can remove any sorting option if you do not want to support.
catalogSearchSortByOptionsOrder=e.g. Relevance, Title, Rating

The configuration does not affect the enhanced search of the ILX.

Is this an error so that a ticket should be created, or is this an intended behaviour?

Thanks for your feedback

entry.title: Re: Readiness Check Run for S/4HANA "FOUNDATION" System U...
entry.content:
Hi Ashish,

I’m going to address your second question first. Software components SAP_CUAN and UICAN belong to SAP Marketing (formerly SAP Hybris Marketing). SAP Help Portal includes an upgrade guide for SAP Marketing. Here is a link to the online documentation for the latest release of SAP Marketing: SAP Marketing | SAP Help Portal. In addition, I recommend you review SAP Notes for SAP Marketing, including SAP Note 2469687 - Release strategy for the ABAP Add-on product SAP Marketing (SAP_CUAN + UICUAN).

Regarding your first question, there are no simplification items for SAP Marketing.

I recommend engaging your SAP account team or preferred implementation partner if you have further questions about this upgrade.

Best Regards,
Greg

entry.title: Re: Do I need to do a new init for my extractors now that...
entry.content:
Hi ,

If you are not taking the PCA tool delta cloning approach, here is another option to reduce the impact. When moving your ECC to the cloud (Azure), check with basis if <SYSID>-<CLIENT> remains the same for ECC and BW system. If yes, then generally there is no need to do re-initialization. but there can be other unknown factors beyond your control that can corrupt the delta queue, so you still need to test it in quality. Irrespective of doing re-init or not, you need to perform below steps to reduce the impact and reduce the efforts of reloading the historical data.

1. You need to take ECC downtime, lock all the users and removed the process chains from schedule.

2. Clear the delta queue by loading the data into BW system. 

3. After moving ECC to cloud, post a sample master data and test run a delta master data load. If delta is working fine, test run a transaction delta. if it works, you are good. If you see delta corrupt can do reinitialization without data transfer if you correctly followed step 1 and 2.

entry.title: Re: SlipStream Issue with QM02
entry.content: Well, then I guess the next step is to open a BC-PER support incident and provide access to the system, along with detailed description how to reproduce the problem.

entry.title: An AI Use Case in Energy Procurement with SAP HANA Cloud vector engine and SAP generative AI hub
entry.content:
Introduction:

Since the release of the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine, numerous internal and external stakeholders have been using it productively to achieve their AI business goals. In this blog, I would like to share the details of one such business use case developed by Wipro and certified as a Validated Partner Use Case by SAP. Wipro worked closely with the teams from SAP Hack2Build and SAP BTP Gen AI Lighthouse Program streams to bring their vision to action, specifically in the domain of energy procurement. These innovation-boosting programs from SAP highlight modern use cases leveraging SAP's technology stack, including the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine and SAP generative AI hub within the SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP).

Use Case: Smart Energy Procurement Advisor (SEPA)

The Problem Statement:

The business scenario centers around the challenges faced by energy procurement executives due to sudden surges in energy demand, that require quick identification of optimized procurement strategies. The complexity is also increased by the multitude of procurement options, including renewable energy, long-term contracts, spot markets, and demand-side response (DSR), as well as unstructured contract terms and fluctuating market prices. These factors make the procurement process tedious and complex, with a high dependency on experienced executives. Additionally, there is a lack of visibility and clarity in the rationale behind procurement decisions, making it difficult for the broader organization to understand and participate in the process.

Additionally, the early stages of implementing AI solutions at Wipro presented several challenges, particularly in maintaining security and data integrity. Ensuring that business processes and proprietary practices remained protected while integrating advanced technologies was crucial. Addressing these security challenges was essential for Wipro to gain customer trust and drive the adoption of AI-driven solutions.

Solution:

Wipro’s Smart Energy Procurement Assist (SEPA) is a Gen AI-powered platform specifically designed to address the complexities and challenges faced by energy procurement executives. By leveraging Natural Language Query (NLQ) capabilities and the Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) model, SEPA efficiently navigates the vast array of procurement options. The platform employs multi-dimensional spatial distance ranking to deliver the most relevant historical results, supports the simulation of custom scenarios, and facilitates stakeholder approvals with comprehensive track and trace features. Additionally, SEPA includes a dashboard for event management and detailed closure tracking. With future integration plans for Joule, SEPA enhances the procurement process by reducing costs, improving demand fulfillment, ensuring compliance, decreasing reliance on experienced executives, and strengthening tracking, governance, and auditability.

Building on the capabilities of SEPA, the introduction of the SAP Generative AI Hub and the enhancement of the SAP HANA Cloud database with the vector engine within the SAP BTP landscape provided a robust and secure foundation for Wipro's AI initiatives. This setup allowed Wipro to access Large Language Models (LLMs) like GPT-3.5 and GPT-4.0 within a controlled and secure environment, ensuring that all data processing remained within the BTP suite, thereby mitigating the risks of data leakage or unauthorized access. The integration of the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine further enabled the efficient handling and storage of vector data, crucial for developing industry-grade AI solutions. Together, these tools empowered Wipro to leverage advanced AI capabilities while maintaining strict security protocols, offering a secure, efficient, and scalable platform for their AI-driven innovations.

Use Case Architecture

 

Value Add of SAP HANA Cloud vector engine in realizing Wipro's use case to full potential

Wipro has been building AI solutions for long and more recently with GenAI. With flexible access to LLMs through the SAP Generative AI Hub, building powerful solutions has become relatively easy. Wipro’s SEPA leverages frameworks like Langchain, Text-ada-002 for embedding, and the SAP AI core (SAP Generative AI Hub) for accessing LLMs. The result is a robust Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) based solution, seamlessly powered by  the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine.

As you might see from the solution architecture, SEPA simplifies data extraction from the S/4 stack into the SAP BTP landscape, where it becomes consumable by the Gen AI workflow. This allows for inclusion of S/4 data using natural language queries. Additionally, developers utilized SAP Build Code, which supports Joule for GenAI assisted coding.

In essence, Wipro's SEPA solution is a great example of the value added by the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine. The key advantages for this use case includes:

  1. Fast Vector Search: The vector engine enables quick retrieval of similar vectors, enhancing the efficiency of data processing and response generation.
  2. Inherent scalability, high performance, and efficient storage – The usual strong points of SAP HANA Cloud are bolstered now with vector support.
  3. Cost Efficiency Upgrading to SAP HANA Cloud incorporates vector support without extra charges, making it a cost-effective solution for enterprises.
  4. Integrated Data Management: Integrated with structured cross-sectional data, it seamlessly combines vector fields with traditional fields, supporting similar structures and enabling faster development.

Stay tuned for more Partner Use Case Highlights

The successful implementation of the SEPA solution showcases the potential of the SAP Hack2Build & SAP BTP Gen AI Lighthouse program in driving innovation and solving complex industry challenges. Please make sure to check this solution out on our SAP Business Accelerator Hub. Stay tuned for more blogs explaining additional use cases that have benefited from SAP’s tech stack. These upcoming posts will provide deeper insights into various AI-driven solutions, their development processes, and their transformative impacts on different sectors. Join us on this journey as we continue to push the boundaries of what's possible with AI and SAP's advanced technologies.

Note: This blog is a collaborative effort between SAP HANA Cloud Product Management and Wipro, highlighting the innovative use case enabled by the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine. For those interested in implementation details of this solution, Prasanna Mahalingam (prasanna.mahalingam1@wipro.com) from Wipro is available as the primary contact.

References:

  1. Embedding Business Context with the SAP HANA Cloud, Vector Engine
  2. GenAI Reference Solution Architecture on SAP Business Technology Platform
  3. SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine: Quick FAQ Reference
  4. Try for yourself:
    • Harnessing Generative AI Capabilities with SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine
    • Explore SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine via Basic Trial

entry.title: Re: DTP failing with error : “odp_prefetch/error 000001”
entry.content: Delta gets corrupted when you change the client. Did you try to do re-initiation. if it is failing even for re-initialization, try this option:  Even if Transformation and dtp is active, try activating the transformation and dtp using RSDG_TRFN_ACTIVATE. In the selection screen, make sure you change the objects status from INA to ACT.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to run a program or background job only on individual PC?
entry.content:
there so no documentation in english, but i would try to explain.
There is an active'x components, which i use in mine program, one of the component is checking if  dongle is inserted, and if it's inserted, i can connect to web-portal and download documents from it.
If i start a program from se38 everything is working fine,cause the dongle is inserted.
If someone would try to run a program without dongle, he would get a dump.
For more simple understanding, lets imagine i have programm with single line of code

 

 

MESSAGE 'Something' TYPE 'I'.

 

 

 And i want to start exactly this programm, or to create an job or t-code, and do it not like usual background job(which executes at server ), but to make it like single user starts it.

entry.title: Receiving "Destination Host is unreachable!" error when executing SAC stories using HANA Live
entry.content:
The Stories are terminated with "Destination Host is unreachable!" error when we ran stories ran in multiple sessions. The stories contains only table data and no graphs are involved.

We haven't faced any issues with single execution and more over issue mainly started after July 3rd 2024 SAC patch upgrade. Issue is also with few reports where we can cross calculations involved.

We are unable to replicate the error in Test system and issue is intermittent at the Production environment.

All our connections are live and using HANA XSA as a backend system. Running the SAC stories using Chrome and Edge browser.

Please answer :

1. If any one else is facing the issue ?

2. What version the issue started ?

3. What is the backend Source you are using ?

4. Any Possible work around or solution that can be implemented .

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning #Crosscalulation  #Stories SAP Analytics Cloud, augmented analytics SAP HANA streaming analytics SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud SAP HANA, express edition SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling SAP Cloud Integration for data services SAP Data Intelligence SAP Predictive Analytics

entry.title: Re: SAP Intelligent RPA 2.0 SFTP File Download Error
entry.content: Hi, Do you know if it is possible to connect to SFTP using SSH Key?, I have checked the documentation for "Manage files using FTP", but the "FTP Access" process, doesn't have an option to use the private key file, thank you!

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
entry.content:
These have been some really valuable challenges:

Thank you.

entry.title: I cannot highlight invoices to pay in billing SAP for me. This has always worked. What changed?
Re: Follow tutorial to Develop a CAP-based application using GenAI/RAG but subscription failed
entry.content:
Hi Bernd. For support with this Discovery Center's Mission, I would recommend clicking on "More" and then on "Ask Expert" at https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/missiondetail/4371/?tab=overview.

Best regards,
--Vitaliy

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
entry.content:
Done!! 🥳🥳🥳

I also Added it to main page 🥰🥰 so beautiful!!

entry.title: Re: Error P014 when activating Cloud Integration in my ac...

Hi Bhaskar,

I did what you recommended and it worked for me

Thanks.
